Follow-up Guards Playground

Two guards shipped after PR #2864: a regression lint for unquoted argument-hint, and a fork-PR skip for the Quality Report comment step.

1 · Test 4b lint simulator

Paste skill frontmatter below. The lint flags any argument-hint: line whose value opens with a bare [ — the YAML flow-sequence trap that makes strict loaders (Copilot CLI ≥ 1.0.65) silently drop the skill.

2 · Quality Report comment-step gate

The Comment on PR step now runs only when the head repo is the base repo. Fork PRs get a read-only GITHUB_TOKEN, so commenting used to 403 and paint an advisory check red.
